Name:
⭐️ Gold [V2]
(feat. The-Dream) (prod. Plain Pat)
Notes:
OG Filename: Gold_ref 03.18.17
Blobama-era Pusha T throwaway that had his verse reused for "Feel The Love". Was originally snipped by a now-defunct sellers site, before leaking on December 20th, 2022 by Waterfalls after the snippet for the Gunna version was posted.

Name:
Gold [V5]
(feat. Gunna) (prod. Plain Pat)
Notes: Version of "Gold" which features Gunna instead of The-Dream, but still contains the vocals reused for "Feel The Love". Unsure if this came before or after The-Dream's version. Snippet leaked on December 19th, 2022.

Name:
Ye - Queen Bitch [V1]
(prod. Ye)
(How Do You Respond?, What Would Meek Do?)
Notes: Fully solo version of "Queen Bitch" featuring almost 5 minutes of Ye vocals without an open. Has lines that were later we used for "I Love It". Recorded the same day as the "K Flows" version. Unclear whose song it was, at this time. Snippet leaked on November 18th, 2022. Leaked on November 14th, 2023 along with the Protools sessions.

Name:
Ye - Queen Bitch [V2]
(prod. Ye)
(How Do You Respond?, What Would Meek Do?)
Notes:
OG Filename: Queen Bitch K Flows (11.1.17)
Solo version of "Queen Bitch". Not a solo version in the normal sense, but it's a bounced file of Kanye's verse cut-down from the longer version. Leaked on March 10th, 2021 by flab.

Name:

(feat. Pharrell Williams & Tammy Lucas) (prod. The Neptunes)
Notes: Single track was first debuted in 1998 on a radio station. Exact date is unknown and nothing is know about this track. It features Tammy Lucas and Pharrell Williams.

Name:
Thief in the Night
(feat. Pharrell) (prod. The Neptunes)
Notes: Clipse's first song. Nothing known about this track. Pharrell told both of them to be a duo after the recording of this track. They Name theirselves "Eclipse", but shorten to "Clipse" later on.
